content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Moving Points". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1311/problem/F
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers n and k, the number of points and the number of steps. The second line contains n integers, the initial positions of the points.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the final positions of the points after k steps, separated by spaces.

solution.approach: Iterate over each point and update its position k times, then print the final positions.
